Transparency and provision of information to deployers
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This skill KSA describes execution-level work in AI/ML Engineering that is not expected of a VP Data Engineering (vp tier). The role is responsible for overseeing and directing this work, not performing it directly. Excluded on execution-seniority grounds.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could real-world VP Data Engineering practitioners be expected to demonstrate this skill KSA in practice, despite the seniority gap?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NewVantage Partners CDO Survey, Wavestone CDAIO Report, and Gartner leadership effectiveness research confirm that vp-tier roles delegate execution responsibilities to appropriate levels rather than owning them directly.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: seniority-based exclusion is consistent with external evidence on vp-tier role expectations. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Execution-level skill KSA in AI/ML Engineering is outside the expected competency scope for a VP Data Engineering (vp tier). The role oversees this work; it does not perform it directly.
